data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for compatibility with memberships and one-time purchase access.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the compatibility with memberships and one-time purchase access, but the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or validations related to this requirement. While the linked use case mentions the need for compatibility, there are no concrete API reads or persisted state checks presented that would allow for a definitive validation of this requirement. Therefore, the step is blocked as it lacks the necessary evidence to assert a clear outcome.
gaps: No evidence of compatibility with memberships and one-time purchase access validation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add validation for membership and purchase access compatibility
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete API calls and checks that verify compatibility with memberships and one-time purchase access.
